license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.jwacpae
title: ASM Solution 2
author: Christa Smith

steps_raw.instruction: Dissolve 4.796 g MgCl 2 ·6H 2 O into bottle.
Dissolve 0.672 g CaCl 2 ·2H 2 O into bottle.
Dissolve 10.95 mg SrCl 2 ·6H 2 O into bottle.
NaNO 3 : 1 ml primary stock solution (75.00 g/L)
NaH 2 PO 4 ·H 2 O: 1 ml primary stock solution (5.00 g/L)
Na 2 SiO 3 · 9H 2 O (optional): 1 ml primary stock solution (30.00 g/L) Only add if phytoplankton requires silicates.
Measure 500 mL dH 2 O into a 1 L glass bottle.
Mix final solution well and set aside until ready to autoclave.
